services.meta_description: Websites, branding, ads, strategy and consulting. Marketing solutions designed to convert and scale businesses in Mexico and the U.S.
services.hero_subtitle: Build, Grow, Audit. Three ways to work together. Twelve services to find the right one for your brand.
services.service_1_desc: Sites designed to convert, not just to look pretty. Live in 14 days, optimized for SEO, speed and conversion.
services.service_2_desc: Complete strategy that integrates all your brand's channels. One plan, one direction, measurable results.
services.service_3_desc: Data-driven strategies: competitor analysis, audience definition, and a clear roadmap for the next 12 months.
services.service_4_desc: Solid brand identity: brand book, palette, typography, voice and tone. Your brand, consistent at every touchpoint.
services.service_5_desc: Memorable, unique brand names strategically positioned for your target market.
services.service_6_desc: Complete annual plan with objectives, KPIs, editorial calendar and budget allocated by channel.
services.service_7_desc: Smart marketing budget distribution to maximize ROI based on your business objectives.
services.service_8_desc: Professional management of Meta, Google, TikTok and LinkedIn campaigns. Continuous optimization to lower CPA and increase ROAS.
services.service_9_desc: Deep review of your current marketing: what works, what doesn't, and where the opportunities are. Concrete recommendations.
services.service_10_desc: 1:1 sessions to solve specific questions, review campaigns or validate decisions before executing.
services.service_11_desc: Workshops and programs for internal marketing teams. Digital marketing, ads, content and strategy.
services.service_12_desc: Continuous monthly support. An experienced CMO for your brand, without hiring one full-time.

about.meta_description: Bilingual CMO with over 10 years of experience building brands that generate measurable results in Mexico and the United States.
about.hero_title: Over 10 years building brands that generate results.
about.bio_p1: I'm Luis Serrano, CMO and marketing consultant. My job isn't to make pretty brands — it's to make brands that sell. I've spent over a decade building and scaling businesses across Mexico and the United States, from startups to established companies.
about.bio_p2: I specialize in digital strategy, brand positioning and paid media. Bilingual (Spanish and English), with experience leading remote teams on B2C and B2B projects. My approach combines conscious leadership with measurable execution.
about.exp_1_desc: Leading marketing strategy for Latin American expansion. Managing digital campaigns, branding and demand generation.
about.exp_2_desc: Led the marketing team. Content strategy, paid media and events. +25% engagement year over year.
about.exp_3_desc: Created and led the marketing department. Launched campaign that generated +30% in sales and +50% in web traffic in 6 months.
about.exp_4_desc: Marketing coordination for U.S. and Mexico operations. +40% Instagram engagement with new content strategy.
about.exp_5_desc: Developed and executed digital strategy. Video series that generated +35% engagement with target audience.
about.exp_6_desc: Digital campaign management and industry entry point. Social media, content and agency collaboration.
about.philosophy_p1: Conscious leadership: informed, empathetic, long-term decisions. The most effective marketing doesn't shout; it connects. Brands that build authentic communities are the ones that last.
about.philosophy_p2: My process always starts with data and ends with narrative. I measure everything, iterate fast and communicate clearly. If we work together, you'll know exactly what we're doing, why, and the results.

contact.meta_description: Start your project. 15 minutes on WhatsApp and I'll tell you if we're a fit before charging you a cent.
contact.hero_subtitle: Tell me about your project. The first conversation happens on WhatsApp and costs you nothing.

contact.form_success_desc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll respond in less than 24 hours.

privacy.meta_title: Privacy Policy | Luis Serrano Marketing Services
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Luis Serrano Marketing Services (hereinafter, "the Controller") is committed to protecting the privacy of its users and clients. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use and protect the personal information you provide.
privacy.s1_body: Through this website's contact form we collect: full name, email, phone number, company name (optional), country of residence, service of interest and message. We do not collect sensitive data such as financial information, biometric data or special category information.
privacy.s2_body: The personal data you provide is used exclusively to: (a) respond to your inquiries and quote requests, (b) establish a commercial relationship if you choose so, and (c) send you relevant information about our services when you give us explicit consent.
privacy.s3_body: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent given when submitting the contact form, and on the execution of pre-contractual measures at your request.
privacy.s4_body: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except as required by law. We use Web3Forms as our form delivery service, which processes data securely and transmits it directly to our email address.
privacy.s5_body: We retain your personal data for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected, or until you request its deletion.
privacy.s6_body: Under the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, you have the right to: Access your personal data, Rectify it if incorrect, Cancel it when no longer necessary, and Object to its processing. To exercise these rights, send an email to serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com with your request.
privacy.s7_body: If you are an EU resident, you also have additional rights under GDPR: right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. Contact us at serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com to exercise any of these rights.
privacy.s8_body: All images, texts and graphic elements on this site are property of Luis Serrano Marketing Services and are protected by copyright. Unauthorized download, copying or use is prohibited. Photographs of the site owner are protected by technical and legal measures.
privacy.s9_body: This site may use Google Analytics and Meta Pixel cookies to analyze web traffic anonymously. You can disable these cookies from your browser settings.
privacy.s10_body: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page with the update date.
privacy.s11_body: For any questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at: serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com

footer.tagline: Websites and marketing built to convert.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Luis Serrano Marketing Services. All rights reserved.
